channel.title: Coding on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)
channel.description: Recent content in Coding on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)

item.title: Open Source Contributions
item.description: xianmin/hugo-theme-jane – A readable & concise theme for Hugo Enhances and bugfixes #76, #77, #79, #82, #83, #91, #98 RaRe-Technologies/smart_open – Utils for streaming large files Make it possible to change number of retries when reading S3 files #102 s3tools/s3cmd – Command line tool for managing Amazon S3 and CloudFront services Python 3 migration #785, #789, #806, #809 dmlc/xgboost – Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting Library Support different filesystems such as S3FileSystem #965 google/vim-codefmt – codefmt is a utility for syntax-aware code formatting.
